display.purpose: Flyer titles and h2/h3 on the A5 page only. Never in the chrome.

prose.purpose: Flyer body text; sized in pt because it is a print measurement (--base, default 9.5pt).

title.purpose: Modal and panel titles — the chrome's largest type, capped at 1rem.

body.purpose: Buttons, list rows, form text — the workhorse 0.8125rem.

label.purpose: Pane/field labels, sentence case; never uppercase-tracked eyebrows.

mono.purpose: Markdown source textarea, mnemonic grid, diff view, code chips.

shadows.name: page-glow
shadows.purpose: The A5 page only — the lit object in the dim room. Removed in print.

shadows.name: popover-lift
shadows.purpose: Toolbar popovers; proposal pane uses 0 12px 40px rgba(0,0,0,0.5).

shadows.name: warning-glow
shadows.purpose: Overflow danger bars only — loudness rendered as light.

motion.name: control-transition
motion.purpose: Default hover/focus state change on every control.

motion.name: status-pulse
motion.purpose: Checking/connecting dots; disabled under reduced motion — the dot color still carries the state.

components.name: Primary Button (brass)
components.description: The one filled control per view — the final act of a workflow (Tisknout / PDF, Přijmout).
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { background: oklch(0.78 0.125 78); color: oklch(0.23 0.030 80); font-family: 'Source Sans 3', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.8125rem; font-weight: 600; padding: 7px 14px; border: 1px solid transparent; border-radius: 6px; cursor: pointer; transition: background 0.15s; } .ds-btn-primary:hover { background: oklch(0.83 0.125 80); } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid oklch(0.78 0.125 78); outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Ghost Button (toolbar)
components.description: The toolbar default: quiet until touched — transparent at rest, surface fill on hover.
components.css: .ds-ghost-wrap { background: oklch(0.255 0.008 80); padding: 10px; border-radius: 8px; display: inline-block; } .ds-btn-ghost { background: transparent; color: oklch(0.80 0.015 82); font-family: 'Source Sans 3', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.8125rem; font-weight: 500; padding: 7px 14px; border: 1px solid transparent; border-radius: 6px; cursor: pointer; transition: background 0.15s, color 0.15s; } .ds-btn-ghost:hover { background: oklch(0.33 0.009 80); color: oklch(0.93 0.012 85); } .ds-btn-ghost:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid oklch(0.78 0.125 78); outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Secondary Button (surface)
components.description: Modal/panel actions: flat surface fill with a hairline border.
components.css: .ds-sec-wrap { background: oklch(0.28 0.008 80); padding: 10px; border-radius: 8px; display: inline-block; } .ds-btn-secondary { background: oklch(0.33 0.009 80); color: oklch(0.80 0.015 82); font-family: 'Source Sans 3', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.8125rem; font-weight: 500; padding: 7px 14px; border: 1px solid oklch(0.40 0.012 80); border-radius: 6px; cursor: pointer; transition: background 0.15s, color 0.15s; } .ds-btn-secondary:hover { background: oklch(0.37 0.010 80); color: oklch(0.93 0.012 85); } .ds-btn-secondary:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid oklch(0.78 0.125 78); outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Text Field
components.description: Surface-filled input; focus swaps the border to brass — no glow, no inner ring.
components.css: .ds-field { background: oklch(0.28 0.008 80); padding: 14px; border-radius: 8px; display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 6px; width: 240px; } .ds-field-label { font-family: 'Source Sans 3', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.75rem; font-weight: 600; letter-spacing: 0.01em; color: oklch(0.80 0.015 82); } .ds-input { background: oklch(0.33 0.009 80); border: 1px solid oklch(0.40 0.012 80); border-radius: 6px; color: oklch(0.93 0.012 85); font-family: 'Source Sans 3', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.875rem; padding: 8px 10px; outline: none; transition: border-color 0.15s; } .ds-input:focus { border-color: oklch(0.78 0.125 78); } .ds-input::placeholder { color: oklch(0.70 0.014 80); }

components.name: Sidebar Item (active)
components.description: Concept list rows: quiet Mid text at rest, brass-tint + bright 600 when active.
components.html:
Otevřené hranice — mýty
Leták o migraci
Ekonomika bez hranic
components.css: .ds-sidebar { background: oklch(0.255 0.008 80); padding: 8px; border-radius: 8px; width: 240px; font-family: 'Source Sans 3', system-ui, sans-serif; } .ds-side-item { padding: 9px 10px; margin-bottom: 2px; border-radius: 6px; font-size: 0.875rem; color: oklch(0.80 0.015 82); cursor: pointer; white-space: nowrap; overflow: hidden; text-overflow: ellipsis; transition: background 0.15s; } .ds-side-item:hover { background: oklch(0.30 0.008 80); } .ds-side-item--active { background: oklch(0.78 0.125 78 / 0.13); color: oklch(0.93 0.012 85); font-weight: 600; }

components.name: Segmented Toggle (palette)
components.description: Barevný / Černobílý: one hairline pill, active segment fills Surface. Icon + word, never icon-only.
components.css: .ds-seg-wrap { background: oklch(0.28 0.008 80); padding: 12px; border-radius: 8px; display: inline-block; } .ds-seg { display: flex; border: 1px solid oklch(0.40 0.012 80); border-radius: 6px; overflow: hidden; } .ds-seg-btn { flex: 1; display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; gap: 6px; background: none; border: none; border-right: 1px solid oklch(0.40 0.012 80); color: oklch(0.70 0.014 80); font-family: 'Source Sans 3', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.8125rem; font-weight: 500; padding: 7px 12px; cursor: pointer; transition: background 0.15s, color 0.15s; } .ds-seg-btn svg { opacity: 0.85; } .ds-seg-btn:last-child { border-right: none; } .ds-seg-btn:hover:not(.ds-seg-btn--active) { background: oklch(0.30 0.008 80); color: oklch(0.80 0.015 82); } .ds-seg-btn--active { background: oklch(0.33 0.009 80); color: oklch(0.93 0.012 85); }

components.name: Toast (with undo)
components.description: Bottom-center notification: surface fill, strong hairline, brass action link.
components.css: .ds-toast { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 12px; background: oklch(0.33 0.009 80); border: 1px solid oklch(0.50 0.014 80); border-radius: 8px; padding: 10px 16px; color: oklch(0.93 0.012 85); font-family: 'Source Sans 3', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.8125rem; min-width: 240px; max-width: 440px; box-shadow: 0 8px 24px rgba(0,0,0,0.5); } .ds-toast-msg { flex: 1; line-height: 1.45; } .ds-toast-action { background: none; border: 1px solid oklch(0.50 0.014 80); border-radius: 6px; color: oklch(0.78 0.125 78); font-family: 'Source Sans 3', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.75rem; font-weight: 600; padding: 4px 10px; cursor: pointer; white-space: nowrap; transition: border-color 0.15s, color 0.15s; } .ds-toast-action:hover { border-color: oklch(0.78 0.125 78); color: oklch(0.83 0.125 80); }

components.name: Status Chip (sync)
components.description: Dot + word status: green online, red offline, pulsing while checking (color-only under reduced motion).
components.css: .ds-chip-wrap { background: oklch(0.255 0.008 80); padding: 10px 14px; border-radius: 8px; display: inline-block; } .ds-sync { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 7px; font-family: 'Source Sans 3', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.75rem; letter-spacing: 0.01em; color: oklch(0.80 0.015 82); } .ds-sync-dot { width: 8px; height: 8px; border-radius: 50%; background: oklch(0.70 0.014 80); } .ds-sync-dot--online { background: oklch(0.76 0.140 150); }

narrative.overview: The editor is a dim workshop in warm deep grays, and the A5 preview is the one lit object in the room. Panels sit in a narrow band of dark warm-gray lightness steps, text is quiet but AA-legible, and a single brass accent marks actions, selection, and focus — nothing else. The system is split into two worlds that never mix: flyer tokens style only the page and print output; --ui-* tokens style everything around it, so the tool can be redesigned without ever reflowing the paper. The chrome explicitly rejects generic SaaS dashboard chrome, Canva/Figma design-tool maximalism, and the dark-hacker/terminal aesthetic — the mood is print shop, not code editor.
keyCharacteristics: Dark warm-gray chrome (hue ~80) receding around one bright A5 page
One brass accent, used for action/selection/focus only — never decoration
Two token worlds: --ui-* for the tool, flyer tokens for the paper; never crossed
Sans chrome (Source Sans 3), serif paper (Fraunces + Crimson Pro), mono only for Markdown source and secrets
Calm, state-only motion; AA contrast throughout; Czech-first UI copy

rules.name: The Two Worlds Rule
rules.body: Flyer tokens style .page and print output; --ui-* tokens style everything else. A chrome change must never alter the paper; a flyer-design change must never touch the chrome. Crossing the namespaces is forbidden.

rules.name: The One Brass Rule
rules.body: Brass appears only on actions, selection, and focus — and at most one filled brass control per view. If brass is decorating rather than pointing, remove it.

rules.name: The Serif Stays on the Paper Rule
rules.body: Fraunces and Crimson Pro may only appear inside .page. Chrome labels, buttons, and headings are always Source Sans 3 — a serif in the chrome is a regression to the rejected pre-redesign look.

rules.name: The Fixed Scale Rule
rules.body: Chrome type uses a fixed rem scale (0.6875 / 0.75 / 0.8125 / 0.875 / 1rem). No fluid clamp() sizes in the tool; fluid type belongs nowhere near a print-truth preview.

rules.name: The Lit Object Rule
rules.body: Only the page and true floating layers cast shadows. If a resting panel, card, button, or input has a box-shadow, it's wrong — depth at rest is a tonal step, never a shadow.

dos: Do keep the two worlds separate: --ui-* for chrome, flyer tokens for .page. Restyling the tool must never reflow the paper (The Two Worlds Rule).
Do reserve brass for actions, selection, and focus — one filled brass control per view, everything else ghost or surface (The One Brass Rule).
Do express chrome depth as tonal steps on the hue-80 ramp with 1px hairlines; shadows belong only to the page and floating layers (The Lit Object Rule).
Do hold AA contrast: ≥4.5:1 body text, ≥3:1 large text, placeholders included — verified pairs are Bright/Mid/Dim on their designated surfaces.
Do keep motion at 150–250 ms ease-out, state-driven only, with a prefers-reduced-motion alternative for every animation.
Do surface print problems loudly (danger bars, outlines, faded clip masks) — overflow and fit problems are surfaced, never hidden.
Do write UI copy Czech-first, sentence case, in the quiet-workshop voice.
Do use the semantic z-scale tokens (popover 100 → toast 500); use lucide icons at 15px / stroke 1.8 / 0.85 opacity, always paired with a word in buttons.
donts: Don't build "generic SaaS dashboard chrome" — no card grids, gradients, icon tiles, or hero metrics.
Don't drift into "design-tool maximalism (Canva/Figma-style)" — no floating toolbars, panel forests, or property inspectors everywhere.
Don't slide into the "dark-hacker / terminal aesthetic" — dark chrome, yes; mono everywhere, scanlines, or neon, never. The mood is print shop, not terminal.
Don't put Fraunces or Crimson Pro in the chrome — serif UI labels are the rejected pre-redesign look (The Serif Stays on the Paper Rule).
Don't shadow resting chrome, use borders >1px, or reach for side-stripe accents, gradient text, or glassmorphism. Ever.
Don't let anything in the room outshine the page: no bright panels, no saturated fills on inactive states, no chrome type larger than 1rem.
Don't animate for decoration, choreograph page loads, or use arbitrary z-index values like 999.
Don't print screen-only aids: overflow bars, placeholders, hover washes, and editing affordances must all be suppressed in @media print.
